full_text:
Luo Ye
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luo Ye. Accompanied the cortège for the re-burial of Emperor Xian’s mother Lady Wang. Luo Ye was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
